summary: Iteration 13: All requested features verified. 1) Label change from 'Issued' to 'Released' on Paddy Custody Register UI confirmed. 2) All 8 CMR export endpoints (Excel/PDF for Milling Report, FRK Purchases, By-Product Sales, Paddy Custody Register) return HTTP 200. 3) All 4 sub-tabs have working Excel/PDF export buttons.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CMR export endpoints working. Paddy Custody Register shows 'Released' instead of 'Issued'. Export buttons exist on all 4 sub-tabs: subtab-milling, subtab-frk, subtab-byproducts, subtab-custody. Key data-testid for export buttons: milling-export-excel, milling-export-pdf, frk-export-excel, frk-export-pdf, byproduct-export-excel, byproduct-export-pdf, custody-export-excel, custody-export-pdf.

label_change.total_released_label: Visible on Paddy Custody Register summary card (was 'Total Issued')
